/usr/bin/c++ -g "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/generator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/mapper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/validate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/descriptor_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/backends/clickhouse_renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/backends/clickhouse_insert_renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/backends/timescale_renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/src/backends/timescale_insert_renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/protoc-gen-dbddl.dir/db_options.pb.cc.o" -o protoc-gen-dbddl  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotoc.so
